title: Stage30-ARCH: Entitlement-First Architecture Contract
core_claim: ContraMamba is an entitlement-first verification architecture. It separates whether a claim is judgeable from how it should be judged. Judgeability must be resolved before polarity. The novelty is not the use of Mamba; the novelty is the separation of entitlement from polarity. ContraMamba targets confident errors caused by entitlement failure: cases where a model predicts SUPPORT/REFUTE despite structurally insufficient or mismatched evidence.

current_proxy_stack.description: The current v7 implementation is a bridge/proxy stack, not the target architecture. It approximates the target axis hierarchy using available heads and caps.

flow.name: Stage30-D temporal mismatch multihead risk signal
flow.formula: temporal_mismatch_fused_prob  (frame/predicate/sufficiency heads fused by fusion mode)

flow.name: H1 final composer
flow.bottleneck_note: H1 composer fails to surface NOT_ENTITLED from lowered entitlement when support_energy is high. This is the structural bottleneck identified in Stage30-E.

proxy_mapping.FrameGate: Partial Hard Core Validity (temporal slot matching)

not_implemented: Clean structural separation between Hard Core and Coverage/Entailment
all/some, specific/general, part/whole, only/also coverage failure detection
Full Residual Adjudication with a structured residual vector
A robust Final Composer that reliably surfaces NOT_ENTITLED from lowered entitlement

interpretation.detail: The temporal mismatch risk head and the temporal preservation-aware cap both worked as designed. Entitlement was reduced from 0.928 to 0.283. However, time_swap predictions remained SUPPORT 60/60, NE 0/60. At entitlement=0.283 with high support_energy, the product entitlement * support_energy still exceeds ne_score = ne_bias + alpha * (1 - entitlement). The H1 final composer is the structural bottleneck.
interpretation.correct_response: Structured architecture reset (Stage31+), not more cap/gamma/boost iteration.
interpretation.ne_boost_ablation: Adding composer-side NE boost is a valid optional stress-test ablation (Stage30-E2) to confirm the bottleneck hypothesis. It is NOT the main architecture path.

target_architecture.description: The target architecture that ContraMamba is designed toward. Not yet fully implemented.

axes.name: Hard Core Validity
axes.question: Is this pair even about the same judgeable target, event, or relation?

axes.name: Coverage / Entailment
axes.question: Does the evidence cover or entail the claim's required scope, strength, or specificity?

axes.name: Residual Adjudication
axes.question: Is this remaining difference a real mismatch, or a harmless/preserved variation?

flow.name: ANI-style Epistemic Diagnosis
flow.note: Not a primary decision axis. Diagnostic readout over structural entitlement failures.

flow.name: Polarity Layer
flow.question: If the claim is judgeable, does the evidence support or refute it?
flow.constraint: Operates only after Structural Entitlement Layer has passed the claim

flow.name: Final Composer
flow.rule: Single Owner Rule: each final label (SUPPORT/REFUTE/NOT_ENTITLED) has exactly one primary owning axis

hard_core_validity.question: Is this pair even about the same judgeable target, event, or relation?
covers: Different event (temporal mismatch: claim and evidence about different events)
Clear role reversal (subject/object swap that changes truth value)
Clear relation mismatch (developed vs. published, caused vs. correlated)
Hard circumstance mismatch (location, modality, or condition invalidity)
Minimum evidence absence (evidence is structurally empty or disconnected)
invariants: Hard Core failure cannot be rescued by preservation logic, coverage adjustment, or residual adjudication
Hard Core fires -> Final Composer emits NOT_ENTITLED; polarity is not consulted
Temporal frame mismatch is a Hard Core concern, not a Coverage/Entailment concern

coverage_entailment.question: Does the evidence cover or entail the claim's required scope, strength, or specificity?
examples: All -> Some: evidence about all licenses support of some. Valid support.
Some -> All: evidence about some does not license universal claim. Coverage failure.
Specific -> General: specific case can support general claim. Valid.
General -> Specific: general evidence does not license specific claim. May fail.
Only -> Winner: only participant licenses winner. Valid.
Also -> Only: also does not license only. Failure.
invariants: Coverage/Entailment is strictly distinct from temporal or source-frame invalidity (Hard Core)
Do not collapse all/some, part/whole, or specificity cases into frame mismatch
Low coverage triggers NOT_ENTITLED before polarity is computed

residual_adjudication.question: Is this remaining difference a real mismatch, or a harmless/preserved variation?
preserved_variation_examples: Temporal expression variation (paraphrase of a time reference)
Location alias or granularity (city vs. metro area when not semantically critical)
real_mismatch_examples: Scope ambiguity that changes truth value
Temporal offset that invalidates the claim window
invariants: No global preservation rescue: cannot rescue claims blocked by Hard Core
No double penalty: claims already penalized by Hard Core receive no additional residual penalty
Residual Adjudication is NOT direct cap stacking. Stacking caps is a proxy approximation, not structured adjudication.
Stage30-E temporal preservation-aware cap is a primitive approximation, not the target Residual Adjudication

ani_mapping.ignorance: Insufficient evidence, coverage failure, missing scope support. Maps to Coverage/Entailment failure.
ani_mapping.ambiguity: Unresolved residual, multiple plausible readings, borderline relation or scope. Maps to Residual Adjudication uncertainty.
ani_mapping.novelty: Claim introduces information not licensed by evidence. Maps to Coverage/Entailment or Hard Core overflow.

invariants: ANI is a diagnostic readout, not a primary decision axis
ANI signals cannot unilaterally change a verdict
ANI is not trained as primary classifier in the target architecture
ANI informs calibration, confidence scoring, and post-hoc analysis only

polarity_layer.question: If the claim is judgeable, does the evidence support or refute it?
invariants: Only operates after the Structural Entitlement Layer has passed the claim
High support/refute energy must not override low entitlement
Entitlement gates polarity, not the reverse

final_composer.rule: Single Owner Rule: each final label (SUPPORT, REFUTE, NOT_ENTITLED) has exactly one primary owning axis
invariants: No two axes may claim the same label for conflicting reasons
Overlapping ownership is a spec violation
Emits final prediction with attached confidence

architecture_rules.rule: Entitlement before polarity. The model must resolve whether the claim is judgeable before computing polarity. High polarity energy does not override low entitlement.
Single Owner Rule. Each final label has exactly one primary owning axis. Overlapping ownership is a spec violation.
No double penalty. A claim already penalized by Hard Core must not receive an independent penalty from Residual Adjudication for the same root cause.
No global preservation rescue. A temporal preservation signal cannot rescue a claim blocked by Hard Core Validity. Preservation logic is local to Residual Adjudication.
Hard Core failures cannot be rescued. Once Hard Core fires, the final label is NOT_ENTITLED. No downstream signal reverses this.
Coverage/Entailment is not the same as Frame. Temporal or source-frame invalidity is Hard Core. Coverage addresses semantic scope and logical entailment. Do not conflate.
Residual Adjudication is not direct cap stacking. Stacking caps (location, temporal, preservation) is a proxy approximation. The target is structured adjudication.
ANI is diagnostic, not the primary decision mechanism. ANI signals cannot unilaterally change a verdict. They inform calibration and confidence.
Current v7 proxy stack is a bridge, not the target architecture. Stage30-E results confirm H1 composer is the bottleneck. The correct path is architecture reset, not composer patching.

roadmap.description: Freeze architecture contract. Document current proxy stack vs. target architecture. Record Stage30-E diagnostic results and their correct interpretation.
Bridge experiment: temporal residual preservation-aware cap, reusing Stage30-D mismatch risk. Not the final architecture. Result: temporal heads and cap working; H1 composer is the bottleneck.

Residual-aware NE boost in the H1 composer. Stress-test only: confirm that lowering entitlement to ~0.283 is sufficient to surface NE when the composer is given a stronger NE signal. NOT the main architecture path. Does not address the structural separation problem.
Coverage/Entailment diagnostic and probe. Focus: all/some, specific/general, part/whole, only/also failure modes. Do not conflate with frame mismatch.
Relation/role/nuance diagnostic. Focus: published/distributed, developed/published, caused/correlated, set-to-replace/replaced.
Order/modality/condition diagnostic. Focus: before/after, planned/actual, may/cause, necessary/sufficient, if/only-if.
Axis pruning and owner conflict audit. Audit which axes own which failure modes. Prune overlapping ownership and resolve Single Owner Rule violations. Prepare for Final Composer multi-axis fusion.

forbidden_misinterpretations.statement: Do not claim ContraMamba solves all hallucination. ContraMamba targets confident errors caused by entitlement failure. It is not a universal hallucination solver and does not verify world truth without reliable evidence.
Do not claim the current v7 proxy stack is the final architecture. It is a bridge/proxy stack. Stage30-E confirmed that the H1 composer is the structural bottleneck.

Do not treat Stage30-E temporal preservation-aware caps as the final Residual Adjudication mechanism. They are a primitive approximation. Residual Adjudication in the target architecture is a structured decision, not direct cap stacking.
Do not treat ANI axes (novelty, ambiguity, ignorance) as direct primary decision heads. They are diagnostic readouts over structural entitlement failures, not classifiers.
Do not train the final classifier on time_swap examples as part of the main training data. time_swap is diagnostic auxiliary data only.
Do not use Stage15 external probes or OOD data for training, calibration, or checkpoint selection. Stage15 is evaluation-only.
Do not claim the novelty of ContraMamba is the use of Mamba architecture. The novelty is the separation of judgeability/entitlement from polarity.
